name: Fried Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and core the apples, then slice them into quarters or smaller pieces.
2. Salt the apple slices lightly and set aside.
3. In a bowl, mix together the breadcrumbs, sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
4. Melt the butter in a pan over medium heat (do not use margarine).
5. Once the butter is hot, add the caraway seeds to the pan and stir until they are coated with the melted butter.
6. Carefully place the wet apple slices (wet from the salt) into the breadcrumb mixture.
7. Gently toss the apple slices to coat them evenly in the breadcrumbs.
8. When the butter is very hot, carefully add the apple slices to the pan.
9. Fry the apple slices on all sides until they are golden brown and crispy.
10. Serve garnished with a sprig of mint and a few thin slivers of honey over the top.
Note: Make sure not to overcrowd the pan when frying the apple slices, as this can cause them to steam instead of fry. Fry in small batches if necessary.
